features.name: Test Manager
features.description: An admin application for running, filtering, and tracking Datagrok package tests across all installed packages, with per-test, per-category, and per-package history queries.
features.evidence_summary: Named 'Test Manager' app with dedicated tree browser, test-runner functions, three history queries, a matching guide doc, and a changelog dominated by 'TM:' prefix entries covering routing, Dart test integration, state saving, and hierarchy improvements.

features.name: Developer Panel
features.description: A sidebar widget that auto-starts when DevTools is loaded, giving plugin developers quick access to developer tooling such as the script runner and object inspection within Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: renderDevPanel widget and autostartTools autostart function both explicitly implement the Dev Panel; changelog entry GROK-13970 fixes the Dev Panel run option by name.

features.name: Inspector Panel
features.description: Registers a custom DevTools panel inside the Datagrok object Inspector, exposing developer-relevant properties and actions for the currently selected object.
features.evidence_summary: Function is a widget with friendly_name 'DevTools' registered as an inspector panel; changelog GROK-13265 specifically introduced the ability to add custom inspector panels.
